name: tripo-game-agent-superpowers
description: A Superpowers-style local plugin for Tripo game-asset workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Superpowers-style workflow for game-ready Tripo assets.
interface.longDescription: Tripo Game Agent Superpowers is a local, installable agent plugin for game-ready Tripo asset workflows. It uses a Superpowers-style bootstrap skill plus composable game asset skills for intake, planning, production, readiness review, fallback, packaging, and asset memory. Real generation requires a local CLI, TRIPO_API_KEY, file writes under workspace/ and outputs/, and network calls to Tripo APIs.
defaultPrompt: Use the Tripo Game Agent workflow to preview a Unity mech character from a natural-language goal.
Use skills/using-tripo-game-agent/SKILL.md, then run ./bin/tripo-agent ask "Unity 里用的机甲角色，quad mesh，15k 面" if shell execution is available.
Explain how the local CLI protects Tripo generation with inventory, planning, preflight, readiness, packaging, and memory.
